song_name: If You Love Somebody Set Them Free

versions.song_name: If You Love Somebody Set Them Free
versions.version_description: Unique, jazz infused pop rock here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as chorus repeating to fade with ad-libs.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: If You Love Somebody Set Them Free

content:
[ch]Dm[/ch]* (000765) 
[ch]C[/ch]* (000553)

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]*             [ch]C[/ch]*             [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
If you need somebody, call my name[/tab]
If you want someone, you can do the same
If you want to keep something precious
You got to lock it up and throw away the key
If you want to hold onto your possession
Don't even think about me
 
[Chorus] x2
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]-[ch]Bm[/ch]
If you love somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]
If you love someone [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]-[ch]Bm[/ch]
If you love somebody [/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
If you love someone [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]* [ch]C[/ch]* [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
set them free[/tab]
If it's a mirror you want, just look into my eyes
Or a whipping boy, someone to despise
Or a prisoner in the dark
Tied up in chains you just can't see
Or a beast in a gilded cage
That's all some people ever want to be

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F4[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]               
You can't control an independent heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]F4[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]               
Can't tear the one you love apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                             [ch]F4[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]                       
Forever conditioned to believe that we can't live[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                       [ch]C7[/ch] 
We can't live here and be happy with less[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                     [ch]F4[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                       
So many riches, so many souls[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]C7[/ch] 
Everything we see we want to possess[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]*             [ch]C[/ch]*             [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
If you need somebody, call my name[/tab]
If you want someone, you can do the same
If you want to keep something precious
You got to lock it up and throw away the key
If you want to hold onto your possession
Don't even think about me

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]-[ch]Bm[/ch]
If you love somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]
If you love someone [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]-[ch]Bm[/ch]
If you love somebody [/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
If you love someone [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]* [ch]C[/ch]* [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
set them free[/tab]
If it's a mirror you want, just look into my eyes
Or a whipping boy, someone to despise
Or a prisoner in the dark
Tied up in chains you just can't see
Or a beast in a gilded cage
That's all some people ever want to be
